headline: Patterson Announces Chief Digital Officer
summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., March 26, 2026--Patterson Companies has announced the appointment of Gregg Kunes as Patterson’s new chief digital officer. Kunes brings a wealth of experience in driving growth and modernization in complex global distribution and manufacturing environments.

headline: Is Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) One of the Best Conservative Stocks to Buy Right Now?
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE:TMO) is one of the Best Conservative Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 24, the company announced that it had completed the acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc. The consideration included $8.875 billion in cash, along with potential additional earnout as well as other payments. These are mainly dependent on performance. […]
